3072220.name: Ottoman Dreams: Rise of Süleiman
3072220.description:
"Ottoman Dreams: Rise of Süleiman" is a visual novel game where you will witness the rise of the great 16th-century Ottoman Sultan, Suleiman the Magnificent, from his youth. This captivating story takes players deep into history, shedding light on the most glorious periods of the Ottoman Empire.

Players will step into the life of Sultan Suleiman, filled with palace intrigue, battle strategies, and grand conquests, experiencing firsthand how his decisions shaped world history. Thanks to the interactive nature of the game, players will guide Suleiman through various critical decisions, shaping the fate of the empire, and concluding the story in their own unique way through multiple endings.
3072220.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 土耳其语
